title: Cleavable comonomer strategy for accelerating removal of gel nail polish
abstract: The present invention provides polymer compositions for use in cosmetic nail polish compositions. More particularly, the present disclosure relates to the introduction of cleavable comonomer additives into an existing polymer composition to produce a chemically deconstructable composition. Methods and compositions for removing the nail polish composition are also disclosed.
claims: 1. A polymer composition, comprising: a first monomer of Formula I or a tautomer or salt thereof
